scripts.tasks:stop: node scripts/runtime-tasks.mjs stop && node scripts/llm-runtime.mjs stop
scripts.agentic:evaluate: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const path = require('node:path'); const exe = process.env.PYTHON_EXECUTABLE || path.join(process.cwd(), '.venv', 'Scripts', 'python.exe'); const r = spawnSync(exe, ['scripts/python/evaluate_agentic_relevance.py'], { cwd: process.cwd(), env: { ...process.env, PYTHONIOENCODING: 'utf-8' }, stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(r.status ?? 1);"
scripts.agentic:runtime: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const path = require('node:path'); const exe = process.env.PYTHON_EXECUTABLE || path.join(process.cwd(), '.venv', 'Scripts', 'python.exe'); const r = spawnSync(exe, ['scripts/python/inspect_llm_runtime.py'], { cwd: process.cwd(), env: { ...process.env, PYTHONIOENCODING: 'utf-8' }, stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(r.status ?? 1);"
